description: This hierarchical diagram illustrates the breakdown of the "VHR 2012-2018 Lot4: Riparian Zones" product into its constituent parts. The overarching product, "VHR 2012-2018 Lot4: Riparian Zones", is composed of a "Primary product" and a "Reference product". The "Primary product" is identified as "Land Cover/Land Use 2012-2018 with change mapping". The "Reference product" is the "Parent Scene Identification Layer (PSIL)".
